info.title: Segment Routing Policy Details
info.description: This module defines a Data Model for reporting operational state of Segment Routing Policies.

cnc-host.description: host name or ip address of the target CNC Cluster

cnc-port.description: port number of the target CNC Cluster

get.description: Retrieve all SR Policies for the network.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Used by the client to specify the number of list elements to skip before returning the requested set of list entries.  The value is an integer greater than or equal to 0.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Used by the client to specify a limited set of list entries to retrieve. The value is an integer greater than or equal to 1

200.description: Container of MPLS Segment Routing Policies

get.summary: Retrieve an SR policy operational data
get.description: Retrieve the SR Policy that matches the given Headend, Endpoint, and Color values. The headend and endpoint values are IP addresses.

sr-policy-type.description: The Crosswork SR Policy type for this policy (leaf)

policy-protection-status.description: SR policy protection status for Circuit-Style SR Policy (non-presence)

status.description: SR policy protection status: OFF, PROTECTED and UNPROTECTED. (leaf)

binding-sid.description:
Binding SID assigned to the policy
*** Or is BSID associated with a path? (leaf)

srv6-sid-structure.description:
SRv6 SID Structure is used to advertise
the length of each individual part of the SRv6 SID (non-presence)

lb-length.description: SRv6 SID Locator Block length in bits. (leaf)

ln-length.description: SRv6 SID Locator Node length in bits. (leaf)

func-length.description: SRv6 SID Function length in bits. (leaf)

arg-length.description: SRv6 SID Argument length in bits. (leaf)

msd.description:
Maximum SID Depth
*** Should this be associated with a path or is it more of a
headend property? (leaf)

pce-controlled.description: If true, policy can be re-optimized by PCE (leaf)

delegated-pce.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the delegated PCE (leaf)

sub-delegated-pce.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of the sub-delegated PCE (leaf)

pcc-address.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of PCC (Path Compute Client) (leaf)

items.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address of one of the non-delegated PCE (leaf-list)

update-time.description: The time stamp of the most recent update to the SR Policy in the Crosswork database. (leaf)

path.description: List of paths associated with the policy (list)

path-name.description:
Path Name
*** Is there also an ID (equivalent of LSP ID) to identify a path? (leaf)

metric-type.description: Metric type to optimize for this path (leaf)

metric-value.description: Cumulative metric value for the path (leaf)

unprotected-only-flag.description:
If true, path must include unprotected SIDs only, else
protected SIDs should be preferred (leaf)

sid-algorithm.description: The Flex Algo of SIDs in path computation. (leaf)

computed-time.description: Time stamp when the path was computed (leaf)

profile-id.description: Associates this path with a forwarding profile on the router/ device (leaf)

hop.description: Segment/ Hop list for this path (list)

remote-address.description: Remote address of the link adjacency. Not applicable in case of Node SID.

protected-flag.description: If true, the SID is protected (leaf)

bidirectional-association-id.description: Bidirectional association ID for Circuit Style SR-TE path (leaf)

cisco-crosswork-segment-routing-policy:s.description: Container of MPLS Segment Routing Policies (non-presence)

policy-protection-status.description: SR policy protection status for Circuit-Style SR Policy (non-presence)

status.description: SR policy protection status: OFF, PROTECTED and UNPROTECTED. (leaf)

Path Name

metric-type.description: Metric type to optimize for this path (leaf)

metric-value.description: Cumulative metric value for the path (leaf)

If true, path must include unprotected SIDs only, else
protected SIDs should be preferred (leaf)

sid-algorithm.description: The Flex Algo of SIDs in path computation. (leaf)

computed-time.description: Time stamp when the path was computed (leaf)

profile-id.description: Associates this path with a forwarding profile on the router/ device (leaf)

remote-address.description: Remote address of the link adjacency. Not applicable in case of Node SID.

protected-flag.description: If true, the SID is protected (leaf)

bidirectional-association-id.description: Bidirectional association ID for Circuit Style SR-TE path (leaf)

flags.description: Flags for srv6 end x sid. (leaf)

weight.description:
The value represents the weight of the End.X sid
for the purpose of load balancing. (leaf)

srv6-sid-structure.description:
SRv6 SID Structure is used to advertise
the length of each individual part of the SRv6 SID (non-presence)

lb-length.description: SRv6 SID Locator Block length in bits. (leaf)

ln-length.description: SRv6 SID Locator Node length in bits. (leaf)

func-length.description: SRv6 SID Function length in bits. (leaf)

srv6-sid-structure.description:
SRv6 SID Structure is used to advertise
the length of each individual part of the SRv6 SID (non-presence)

lb-length.description: SRv6 SID Locator Block length in bits. (leaf)

ln-length.description: SRv6 SID Locator Node length in bits. (leaf)

func-length.description: SRv6 SID Function length in bits. (leaf)

local-ip-addr.description:
Local IPv4 or IPv6 address. If type is a Node SID, this will be
the node's IP address, usually associated with a loopback interface (leaf)

local-unnumbered-id.description:
The link local identifier will correspond to the ifIndex value
of the interface, i.e., the ifIndex value of the
ifEntry that represents the interface in
implementations where the Interfaces Group MIB
(RFC 2863) is supported.
It's only for adjacency SID (leaf)

remote-ip-addr.description:
Remote IPv4 or IPv6 address. If type is a Node SID, this will be
the node's IP address, usually associated with a loopback interface (leaf)

remote-unnumbered-id.description:
The link remote identifier will correspond to the ifIndex value
of the interface, i.e., the ifIndex value of the
ifEntry that represents the interface in
implementations where the Interfaces Group MIB
(RFC 2863) is supported.
It's only for adjacency SID (leaf)
